scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read-only streams (projects, stories, iterations, epics) only, matching internal/connectors/pivotal-tracker's exact endpoint set; the full Pivotal Tracker surface (labels, tasks, comments, memberships, mutation endpoints) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /projects/{project_id}/labels is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/projects/{project_id}/memberships is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/projects/{project_id}/stories is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/projects/{project_id}/stories/{story_id} is a destructive/admin mutation and is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action in this bundle
